title: acinos exiguus
intro: Acinos exiguus, also known as sweet marjoram or small marjoram, is a small, annual herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Acinos exiguus include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a natural remedy for colds and coughs. Acinos exiguus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used fresh or dried in cooking and culinary applications.
